导航痕迹

  • 中山大学人工智能学院
  • 
  • 师资力量
  • 
  • 副教授
  • 
  • 董润敏

董润敏


人工智能学院 副教授
电子邮件
dongrm3@mail.sysu.edu.cn
个人简介

董润敏，现任中山大学人工智能学院副教授，硕士生导师。曾任清华大学“水木学者”博士后、香港大学访问学者、慕尼黑工业大学访问学者。2017年在北京交通大学获得理学学士学位，2022年于清华大学获得理学博士学位。﻿长期从事计算机视觉和遥感应用的交叉研究。近年来，在CVPR、ICCV、IJCAI、ACM MM、RSE、ISPRS、TGRS等计算机CCF-A类会议及遥感领域顶级期刊上发表论文40余篇。主持国家自然科学基金青年基金、广东省面上基金等项目，担任国家重点研发项目子课题负责人等。


工作经历

· 2025.2-至今，中山大学，人工智能学院，副教授

· 2022.06-2025.01，清华大学，地球系统科学系，博士后


研究与招生

研究领域：﻿计算机视觉与遥感方法及应用，主要研究内容包含生成模型、多模态数据融合、遥感基础模型构建、大规模遥感图像智能理解与应用等。

欢迎有意申请中山大学硕士研究生、科研助理、访问实习生，以及有意向提前参与科研的中山大学本科生与我联系。邮箱：dongrm3@mail.sysu.edu.cn

更多信息见个人主页：https://dongrunmin.github.io


科研项目

·广东省﻿自然科学基金面上项目，2026-2028，主持广东省﻿自然科学基金面上项目，2026-2028，主持

 ·国家重点研发计划，2023-2026，子课题负责人

· 国家自然科学基金委青年基金，2024-2025，主持

· 中国博士后基金﻿面上项目，2023-2025，主持

· 产学研横向项目，2023-2024，主要负责人

 

主要学术论著

（*通讯作者, †共同一作， 完整列表见﻿Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=6J2t4zEAAAAJ）

[1] Runmin Dong, Shuai Yuan, Litong Feng, Jinxiao Zhang, Weijia Li*, Mengxuan Chen, Bin Luo, Wayne Zhang, and Haohuan Fu*. Transferable Image Synthesis for Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation Via Joint Reference-Semantic Fusion. Information Fusion. 2026. (SCI, 中科院一区, IF=15.5)

[2] Yunkai Yang, Yudong Zhang, Kunquan Zhang, Jinxiao Zhang, Xinying Chen, Haohuan Fu, Runmin Dong*. Task-Oriented Data Synthesis and Control-Rectify Sampling for Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation. IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR). 2026. (CCF-A类会议)

[3] Lixian Zhang†, Yi Zhao†, Runmin Dong†*, Jinxiao Zhang, Shuai Yuan, Shilei Cao, Mengxuan Chen, Juepeng Zheng, Weijia Li, Wayne Zhang, Wei Liu, Litong Feng, Jianxi Huang, and Haohuan Fu. A2-MAE: A spatial-temporal-spectral unified remote sensing pre-training method based on anchor-aware masked autoencode. *IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (TGRS). 2026. (SCI, 中科院一区, IF=8.6)

[4] Weijia Li, Jinhua Yu, Dairong Chen, Yi Lin, Runmin Dong*, Xiang Zhang, Conghui He, and Haohuan Fu*. Fine-Grained Building Function Recognition from Street-View Images via Geometry-Aware Semi-Supervised Learning. International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation (JAG). 2025. (SCI, 中科院一区, IF=8.6)

[5] Runmin Dong, Shuai Yuan, Bin Luo, Mengxuan Chen, Jinxiao Zhang, Lixian Zhang, Weijia Li, Juepeng Zheng, and Haohuan Fu*. Building Bridges across Spatial and Temporal Resolutions: Reference-Based Super-Resolution via Change Priors and Conditional Diffusion Model. In Proceedings of the  IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (pp. 27684-27694). 2024. (CCF-A类会议)

[6] Jinxiao Zhang, Runmin Dong*, Juepeng Zheng, Mengxuan Chen, Lixian Zhang, Yi Zhao, and Haohuan Fu*. Spatial-Temporal Context Model for Remote Sensing Imagery Compression. In Proceedings of the 32nd ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM). 2024. (CCF-A类会议)

[7] Lixian Zhang, Runmin Dong*, Shuai Yuan, Jinxiao Zhang, Mengxuan Chen, Juepeng Zheng, and Haohuan Fu*. DeepLight: Reconstructing High-Resolution Observations of Nighttime Light with Multi-Modal Remote Sensing Data. In Proceedings of the Thirty-Third International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI). 2024. (CCF-B类会议)

[8] Lixian Zhang, Shuai Yuan, Runmin Dong*, Juepeng Zheng, Bin Gan, Dengmao Fang, and Haohuan Fu*. SWCARE: Switchable learning and connectivity-aware refinement method for multi-city and diverse-scenario road mapping using remote sensing images. International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation, 2023, 127, 103665. (SCI, 中科院一区, IF=8.6)

[9] Runmin Dong, Lichao Mou, Mengxuan Chen, Weijia Li, Xinyi Tong, Shuai Yuan, Lixian Zhang, Juepeng Zheng, Xiaoxiang Zhu, and Haohuan Fu*. Large-Scale Land Cover Mapping with Fine-Grained Classes via Class-Aware Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation. In Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (pp. 16783-16793). 2023. (CCF-A类会议)

[10] Runmin Dong, Lichao Mou, Lixian Zhang, Haohuan Fu*, and Xiao Xiang Zhu*. Real-World Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution via a Practical Degradation Model and a Kernel-Aware Network. ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing. 2022, 191, 155-170. (SCI, 中科院一区, IF=12.2)

联系我们

  • 地址：珠海市高新区大学路2号中山大学珠海校区瀚林2号（公共实验大楼）四楼
  • 电话：0756-3668929
  • 邮编：519080
